Localization.Description: The ability to remotely execute commands was enabled, and the code was executed. After receiving a TeamCity API access token, attackers can enable the rest.debug.processes.enable option which allows them to run commands on the server via POST requests

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} enabled the ability to remotely execute commands by changing {datafield6} config and executed their code on host {event_src.host}
Upon request from host {src.host}, the ability to remotely execute commands was enabled by changing {object.name} config, and the code was executed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} enabled the ability to remotely execute commands by changing {object.name} config and executed their code on host {event_src.host}
Upon request from host {src.host}, the ability to remotely execute commands was enabled by changing {datafield6} config, and the code was executed on host {event_src.host}
